$schema: Few-shot examples for Klingon (tlhIngan Hol), KLI Latin transliteration. Best-effort approximations — Klingon lacks vocabulary for many modern-business concepts and these renderings prioritize spirit over canonical accuracy.

examples.source: The Pickup You Can Count On.
Peninsula Pick Ups handles junk removal, hauling, and full-property cleanouts across San Carlos and the entire Peninsula. Real owners. Real phone. Real results.
examples.target: veQ wIteq, wIlup, 'ej juHmey wISay'moH Peninsula Pick Ups San Carlos 'ej Sech naQ. Sechpu' tu'lu'pu'bogh. ghogh tu'lu'pu'bogh. tu'lu'pu'bogh meq.

examples.source: Family owned and operated by Don and Melissa.
examples.target: Don 'ej Melissa qorDu' Daj 'oH 'ej chaH lulIH.

examples.source: We do all the loading, sweep up after, and dispose responsibly. No hidden fees, no surprises, and no estimates that change once we are on-site.
examples.target: Hoch maHvaD wISay'moH, 'oS 'oH wISay'moH, 'ej teqlu'meH chaq. pegh DIl pagh, ngeb merlaw' pagh, 'ej Daq wISaH'a'taHvIS choHqa'be'pu' jang.

examples.source: Most jobs are scheduled within 48 hours. Same-day pickups are often available — call (650) 201-1543 to check.
examples.target: Hoch Qu'mey 48 rep DungDaq lupommeylu'. tu'be'lu'bogh jaj qem rurnISbe'lu'bogh tu'lu'taH — (650) 201-1543 yItlhob 'ej yISuy.

examples.source: Please enter a valid phone number.
I agree to be contacted by Peninsula Pick Ups at the phone number and email above regarding my quote request, including by SMS and call. Consent is not a condition of service.
examples.target: ghogh mI' 'ej De'wI' QIn DaQochbogh Peninsula Pick Ups jIH lutlhobpu' jIH wIvjaj — Huch poQbe'bogh jang vIpoQpu'bogh wIvbej, ngeD QIn 'ej ghogh ngeD lab. wIvjaj rurnISbe'lu'bogh Qu' rurnISbe'.
